metadata.description: Handol Park's Claude Code plugins — orchestration workflows, development discipline, and productivity tools

plugins.name: rlm
plugins.description: RLM-disciplined orchestration — main thread as orchestrator, subagents as workers, task list as call stack

plugins.name: kw
plugins.description: GTD + zettelkasten integration — task management via zk notes, knowledge capture, context recall, and reflection

plugins.name: al
plugins.description: Minimal agentic loop — orchestrator dispatches subagents iteratively, state file as completion signal, hard max-iterations cap
